name: Polka-Dot Brownies
recipeIngredient: Confectioners' sugar and/or Unsweetened cocoa powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly spray an 8-inch square baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Melt chocolate and margarine: Place in top of double boiler over barely simmering water, or microwave until smooth. Remove from heat and stir until combined.
4. Set aside to cool to room temperature.
5. In a large bowl, beat eggs and sugar at high speed with an electric mixer until pale yellow and tripled in volume, about 7 minutes.
6. Add vanilla extract and salt. Mix in the cooled chocolate mixture by hand, then fold in flour until just incorporated.
7. Pour batter evenly into prepared pan.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out almost clean. (If underbaked, they will have a fudgier texture.)
9. Cool on a rack before cutting into 8 equal bars.
10. Dust with confectioners' sugar or cocoa powder if desired.
Makes 8 servings of 1 brownie each.
